occurrences.title: Opening Ceremonies
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Welcome Bulldogs, Puffins, Woofs, Ruffs, and Proudhoofs! (Hooves) We welcome you to our opening Ceremonies, where we kick off this amazing party in the grandest of Kibble Earth tradition!  Priority seating will be given to our Rangers, Guardians and Ringbearers! (No badge required)
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Drunken Fursuit Building
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chinona_
Chinona, the reigning Drunken fursuit builder from last year returns... Will the new challenger this year be able to humble? Will she be vastly disappointed because people donate too much money so no alcohol and instead all Soda?

occurrences.title: Dance - Thursday
occurrences.abstract:
A fun way to end the night dancing until late with a variety of DJs and genres! 
10 - Alien Dawg (Bass Funk, Bass Hop, Funkstep)
11 - Fortenox (Bass House, Dubstep)
12 - Runner (Tech House, Techno, Bass House, Trap, and a little DnB & Dubstep)
1 - T1M3K33P3R (Heavy Bass)
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: So you wanna dance comp?
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Corgnito_
A chance to meet a panel of dancers, experienced and new, from dance comp and floor wars. Ask questions about how to start, how to work on routines, or just anything you may be curious about our panelists. Last 30 minutes reserved for a cipher for panelists and audience to strut their stuff and a chance for people to get input from the dancers.

occurrences.title: some guy presses buttons on a synthesizer for 30 minutes
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Facade_
turn down the energy for a bit with a live, partially improvised electronic music session in a dark room, with some quieter, slower & more ambient music experiments, remixes and covers. many genres that would not be heard at a dance. stay after to ask about the dawless digital setup, or to briefly try it yourself.

occurrences.title: Ultimate Werewolf
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fyger_
Seems our panel has once again become home to some very hungry beasts. Join us in this hidden role game sussing out fellow villagers from werewolves. (Open to players brand-new to seasoned)

occurrences.title: Twisted Tails Escape Room
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Twisted Tails Escape_
Can your team of rescue rangers save this group of animals from The Woes of Wyvern Woods? Tickets are $35 CAD per person with a maximum of 10 players per group. Players by themselves or in a small group will be paired up with other like-minded adventurers to a maximum of 10 players per game. For private bookings, a minimum of 5 tickets must be purchased. Also, a portion of every ticket will go to the convention's charity! Purchase tickets online at [TwistedTailsEscape.com]([url](https://www.twistedtailsescape.com/)) or at our table during the con. If you have any questions, please contact us directly at info@twistedtailsescape.com. See you soon!

occurrences.title: Art Show Gala
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cielle_
Come and mingle with the artists and artisans across Kibble-Earth, talk about their art, their craft and have a nibble while looking at the pieces that will be for sale.

occurrences.title: Artist Lounge
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Part Time Dragons (Spike)_
A cozy, social space designed for artists, creatives, and doodlers of all skill levels to relax, make art, and meet each other! Art Supplies are available to borrow and use in the Lounge. Come hang out, be creative and unwind from the con space!

occurrences.title: Making Mini Fantasy Weapons!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Slurpee_
Hear ye, hear ye! Hast thou ever wondered what weapon your fursona would wield? Well not only will you be able to interact with peers to determine what you think they'd use, but you'll be able to make mini paper versions of your chosen weapon that you can hang on your character badge. If thou art interested, join the court for an enjoyable hour!

occurrences.title: Fourth Fur Suit Game Hobby Horses!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chinona_
Want to build your own Hobby Horse for this year's Fursuit Games?  Join Chinona (and Spacemom?) and build your own hobby horse for one of our fursuit game events!  Basic supplies provided with some fun embellishments!  Feel free to bring your own!  Keep your Hobby Horse! (Not required for Fursuit Games participation but you could help your team!)

occurrences.title: Find the Furluminati
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Dukeskunk_
Most don’t know this but members of the Furluminati have infiltrated even the High Council of Furvania. As a loyalist, figure out who you can trust to help preserve freedom, or maybe you aren’t as loyal as you seem. Paranoia and social deduction based on the game “Secret Hitler”.

occurrences.title: Telestrations After Dark
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jia_
AKA GarticPhone: a combination of Telephone and Pictionary. Draw the prompt you are given, then summarise the picture you are shown. Continue and then when you are done review the hilarity. Can’t draw? No time to worry about that, besides the focus is on the fun, not the art. But remember, these prompts are not for cubs.

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Tabling
occurrences.abstract: _Presented by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Testing
occurrences.abstract: _Hosted by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: Brasil FurFest Portal
occurrences.abstract: Gaze into the Mirror of Pawladriel and see what's happening at one of the other conventions happening this weekend... [Brasil FurFest](https://brasilfurfest.com.br/?lang=en)!

occurrences.title: Unhappy Hour
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Thallanor_
Get a Drink at the tavern with the dark horse himself, Thallanor, and revel in tales of cons from ages past. Some Humorous. Some... Less so.

occurrences.title: Dealer's Den Setup
occurrences.abstract: Setup for Dealer's Den Vendors

occurrences.title: Paint Those Claws
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jaydar_
Love painting your nails, or would like to give it a try? Join this chill meetup where we will paint our nails together! If you don't have any polish, some will be available. There will also be a simple tutorial on colour selection and how to paint a cute pawprint on your thumb!

occurrences.title: Start Small – Scaling prototypes for build projects
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Temperance_
Making a fursuit? Creating a puppet? Building a prop? Don't waste time and materials going too big right away. This panel will show how to visualize your designs with small-scale prototyping and a little bit of math before jumping to the full-sized product. Designing small and scaling your patterns up can save your sanity and your wallet!

occurrences.title: TransFemme 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by EmKat_
Want to learn the basics of being your most fabulous self? Come learn the basics of femininity in a safe and accepting panel of like-minded individuals! All welcome from questioning to full transition!

occurrences.title: Common Dancefur Mistakes
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Scout_
Join two-time Fur-Eh dance comp winner, Scout, as he explains common mistakes made in dancefur choreography and how to fix them. From beginner to experienced to “I’m just curious”, all are welcome.

occurrences.title: PokémonFKR: Smash Or Pass Ultimate
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mana_
Come on down to a good ol’ fashioned adult Pokémon panel, where we will once again cover the topic of ‘would or would I not do the twisted tango with that Pokémon?’. Except this year, we will only be covering pokemon that fall into the category of: were they high when they made that?

occurrences.title: Introduction to 3D Printing
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Thallanor_
What do you do with it? How do you do it? Download existing designs or create your own? 3D printing can sometimes appear daunting, but it doesn't need to be, nor does it have to be expensive. Learn from our pitfalls and mistakes and you can be on your way to enjoying it as a hobby or as a business in no time!

occurrences.title: Furries in Japan: Kemono Culture and Beyond
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mikey (擬巌顔及)_
Stop by for a quick look into the unique world of Japan’s furry community! We’ll cover a range of topics, from cute kemono-style fursuits to how Japanese furry culture differs from North America, as well as the conventions, art, and online spaces that shape it. We’ll also explore the rapid growth of furry idol groups like Production Taiikukan.

occurrences.title: How To Take Commissions 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Breve_
Ever wondered how to take commissions for your artwork/crafting? This is the panel for you! I will show you how to take commissions from the first step to commission completion.

occurrences.title: Tricksy Krocseses Tolkien Trivia
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by KhoroKrok_
Come join Khoro on a trivia trail through J.R.R. Tolkien's world. Questions from the journeys following Thorin's company and the Fellowship. If the Kroc doesn't get too tricksy, that is...

occurrences.title: Recreational Casting: Return of the Cast
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mathias_
The ins and outs of a niche medical kink featuring a QnA and a live demonstration by the resident casted fox.

occurrences.title: Polyamory 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Winterpeg_
Curious about Polyamory? Come and chat about common terminologies and the dos and don'ts about plural love and the poly lifestyle.

occurrences.title: Sapphic social meet-up
occurrences.abstract: An opportunity for sapphic furries to gather and meet other like-minded individuals. Share art, participate in an icebreaker or 2. Your hosts will be 2 lesbian lovers

occurrences.title: Indigenous Furry Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cia Coo_
A meetup for Indigenous furries to meet, discuss, and celebrate Indigenous furries. There will be smudging, fundraising, and a discussion circle about Indigenous fantasy literature. All are welcome, but please respect the intent of the space.

occurrences.title: Being Ace - Asexuality in the fandom
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Synesis_
When you do a smash or pass and everything is a pass.  Curious what it means to be asexual? Just want to come and talk and meet your fellow ace members in the fandom?  Come join in this totally platonic panel. Hosted by an interesting dynamic of an ace and non-ace married couple.

occurrences.title: Do Your Dailies
occurrences.abstract: Just a quick meetup for anyone trying to keep their streak up in their favourite game or gamified app.

occurrences.title: Fursuit Handler 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cielle_
Whether you're a parent of a young fursuiter, attending a con your first time with your suiter friends, or you're simply unsure what a handler does, then this is for you! I'll cover a range of helpful tips and practical advice I've learned over the years for anyone offering (or being volun-told) to be a fursuit handler.

occurrences.title: Sew and Tail
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Silvern_
Love sewing, knitting, crocheting, or embroidery? Join us and share your projects, swap ideas, and meet others with similar creative hobbies.

occurrences.title: HIV & STBBIs 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by HIV Edmonton_
Overview of transmission and prevention of HIV with a Q&A!

occurrences.title: DIY Computering of the 90s
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chiara - Gladiwrites_
Join me for a hands on experience into vintage computing. With a few volunteers, the group will construct a 1990s era system for use and exhbit in the gaming room. You even get to pick the operating system!

occurrences.title: Vore and Micro Macro Sketchbook Swap
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Tiberius Thyben_
A sketchbook swap for anyone and everyone into vore, micro, macro, or any combination thereof! Participants are encouraged to list preferences, dos, and don’ts in their sketchbook, or a sticky note attached to it! Art skills not required!

occurrences.title: Talent Show
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Flecko the Fennec_
Furries are a talented bunch! Come watch as they showcase their talents for your entertainment through singing, playing music, or acting!
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Mousie's Middle-earth Mayhem
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mousie_
A series of competitive games made to test your mettle and steel against the flames and fires of Meowdor!! Featuring Games such as “A knife in the Dark,” The Voice of Saruman,” and “Shelob's Lair!” Come watch the games unfold and decide the fate of the contestants as they head out on a journey into the heart of Meowdor!

occurrences.title: WereWING LIVE! - Pop-Punk Pups
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kady WereWING_
WereWING are Alberta's favourite pup-punk rock band! Having played all across Western Canada, they're back to take their home-con's stage with a collection of original songs and covers. Some explicit lyrics.
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Floor Wars
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kierenshep_
The battle is on! Watch amazing dancers compete for the crown in this amazing competition. Come cheer on your favourites! Priority Seating for Sponsors and Accessibility in effect.
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Dance - Friday
occurrences.abstract:
A fun way to end the night dancing until late with a variety of DJs and genres! 
10 - MorphyMike (Bass House, Tech House, House)
11 - Dual Channel (Multi-Genre. White Girl Pop, EDM)
12 - SVCCVBVS (House/Funk or Drum & Bass)
1 - DJ_Huwls (Techno Mainstage)
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Indie the Bard
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by IndieTimber_
IndieTimber will be performing music from originals, video game themes, covers, and parody.

occurrences.title: Plush & Pooltoy Party
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Azu, Loosa, SydneyRoo, Maddoggy_
Pooltoys and Plush, together at last! Bring your plushies & pooltoys to show off, come hang out with the squeakable inflatables and mountain of plushies in one big party! Chat with plushie and pooltoy friends, get some pics with some amazing toys. Please remove sharp objects while inside the panel space (i.e. conbadges).
*Panel dedicated in memoriam of Tyler Warren*

occurrences.title: 18+ Jackbox
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by SydneyRoo_
**18+** You don't know Jackbox? This isn't your granny's gameshow. Bring your phone and give us your worst Quiplash! Don't be late!

occurrences.title: Twisted Tails Escape Room
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Twisted Tails Escape_
Can your team of rescue rangers save this group of animals from The Woes of Wyvern Woods? Tickets are $35 CAD per person with a maximum of 10 players per group. Players by themselves or in a small group will be paired up with other like-minded adventurers to a maximum of 10 players per game. For private bookings, a minimum of 5 tickets must be purchased. Also, a portion of every ticket will go to the convention's charity! Purchase tickets online at [TwistedTailsEscape.com]([url](https://www.twistedtailsescape.com/)) or at our table during the con. If you have any questions, please contact us directly at info@twistedtailsescape.com. See you soon!

occurrences.title: Artist Lounge
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Part Time Dragons (Spike)_
A cozy, social space designed for artists, creatives, and doodlers of all skill levels to relax, make art, and meet each other! Art Supplies are available to borrow and use in the Lounge. Come hang out, be creative and unwind from the con space!

occurrences.title: Furry Sketch Exchange
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by FritzleFox_
Do you have the need to get art of your sona but don't want to pay a pretty penny for an artist to draw it? Are you willing to draw others' sonas?  Then come on down and draw some other fellow fuzzies!  Make sure to bring a reference sheet and remember; HAVE FUN!! UWU (Bring your own sketchbook and supplies, please!)

occurrences.title: Liar's Bar
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by SydneyRoo_
Come learn to play Liar's Deck and Liar's Dice from the Furry-themed Steam game Liar's Bar.

occurrences.title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate Tournament
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by SabreDragon_
Nintendo's wildly successful fighting game featuring its most iconic characters (which are often anthropomorphic/furry!) See how your skills stack up! Format is Singles (1v1) - Double Elimination style. Bringing your own controller recommended, and extra Switch stations and displays would help too!

occurrences.title: Dungeons & Dragons
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Silkpaws_
Adventure, Excitement, a Dwarf with a bucket? A self-contained adventure in the latest edition of the world's most iconic role-playing game system. Ask Silkpaws in the Games Room (Terrace 5) to sign up ahead of time as this fills up fast. Your character or ours, what’s your preference?

occurrences.title: TCG Trade Night
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kiesh_Carcal_
Do you like Pokemon, Magic or anything in between?!? Do you have duplicates or cards for trade, or want to see cool cards!? Do you have a playable deck? If any are true then bring your binder, a deck, or a friend as we have some TCG fun!!!

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Tabling
occurrences.abstract: _Presented by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Testing
occurrences.abstract: _Hosted by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: Brasil FurFest Portal
occurrences.abstract: Gaze into the Mirror of Pawladriel and see what's happening at one of the other conventions happening this weekend... [Brasil FurFest](https://brasilfurfest.com.br/?lang=en)!

occurrences.title: Fursuit Games
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chinona_
Come and have some fun in fursuit as we race hobby horses, catch the Ring bearer, and other fun games.

occurrences.title: Snep Meet and Greet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Misha_
A small get-together for those who love everything snep / snow leopard! May take a group picture, come talk and hang out.

occurrences.title: Hyena Meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Raf_
Are you a hyena? Me too! Come to the group giggle meet this year! Take pictures, be silly, be loud! All creatures are welcome. Group photo of hyenas at the end!

occurrences.title: Munchkin's Midnight Howl
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Munchkin_
Once again animals. Join us in annual Fur-Eh! Midnight Howl with your fellow animals. Pawesome fun fur all. Let's make this howl the biggest yet.

occurrences.title: Dealer's Den
occurrences.abstract: Friday only: Guests with Ranger or higher may enter starting at 9:45.

occurrences.title: Queer AfFURmations: Finding and Empowering Yourself as a 2SLGBTQ+ Furry
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Nillin Lore_
Join award-winning author and educator Nillin Lore for this exploration into the intersection of queer sexuality, gender identity, neurodivergence, and the furry fandom. Part presentation, part meetup, come connect with other 2SLGBTQ+ furs in this safe, empowering, and inclusive space!

occurrences.title: Working with Faux Fur
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Temperance_
Faux fur is a fun and versatile material to use. This panel will cover a wide range of information about faux fur fabric. Learn terminology, a wide range of uses and sewing techniques from a professional costume and puppet maker with over 15 years experience in the industry.

occurrences.title: Writing Monster Erotica
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Voice_
Curious about writing monster erotica? Are you a reader and are curious about the genre? Come listen to Voice talk about anatomy, what works and doesn't work, and why this genre has gotten so popular.

occurrences.title: Hypnosis and Expectations
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Pythian_
Every adventurer should take the opportunity to sit and relax for a while. Stop and listen to tales that engage the mind while keeping safety paramount. Thoughts and findings about setting expectations not just in hypnosis but in general will be shared.

occurrences.title: The Furry Better Business Bureau: Protecting Yourself Against Scams
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Breve_
There isn't really a "furry better business bureau" available in the fandom, so how do you protect yourself from scams? This panel talks about how to make safe furry purchases and to protect yourself from bad business practices and those who want to take advantage of unsuspecting furries.

occurrences.title: First Time Fursuiting
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Nevermint_
Basically helping out the first-time suiters with the Dos and Don'ts of suiting. What to do and what NOT to do.

occurrences.title: You Can Make Video Games, Too!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ember_
Ever been curious about what it’s like to make a video game, but haven’t tried, or have struggled to get into it in the past? Learn all about awesome tools you can use, and follow Ember as they take you through the process of making an unofficial “Lord of the Wings” game!

occurrences.title: Potatoes, boil em, mash em, put em in a stew
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Synesis_
A whole panel all about the humble potato.  This basic starch is a versatile little vegetable that has many varieties, all with different kind of properties and applications. Also a little showcase of a few recipes on how to prepare potatoes.

occurrences.title: Kink 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Winterpeg_
Into BDSM? Curious about it? Come and learn terminologies, what things to watch for and some important dos and don'ts of the kink life.

occurrences.title: Of Monsters And Men FURRY EDITION!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kenastion_
I've always found monsters more appealing than humans in stories. Hosting this panel previously showed me that there are tons of people like me. I’ll give a brief explanation on how the monster lover genre came to be, how its popularity rose, and how it has always existed culturally around the world. I'll lean into the similarities between furries and anime monster lovers to compare how freaky each group can get. There will also be a special survey at the end just for Fur-Eh! monster lovers.

occurrences.title: Bored of the Rings: Bad Fanfic Reading
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chinona, Fizzpop_
In a random turn of events, this particular theme has ACTUALLY published spoof writing.  Join us in reading it and possibly other horrific and completely inappropriate fanfics.  Can you make it through a page without laughing?

occurrences.title: Writing Isekai Fiction
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Voice_
Your protagonist has met truck-kun and now finds themselves in another world. Now what? Come listen to Voice talk about writing isekai stories.

occurrences.title: Vintage Computing
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Thallanor_
Vintage Computing, as described by a host older than most of the hardware being discussed. We never quite know what is going to be presented, but one thing is for sure: it's old. Dust off your pocket protectors and strap yourself in for what critics have called "not the most boring demonstration of Vintage Computing in a Furry Convention in Western Canada" and what others have said is a "must-see" if you have nothing else going on.

occurrences.title: Worldbuilding Art and Writing for Games
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ollie Canal_
Are you drawing OCs for RPGs?  Do you make maps and build societies? Come and learn how to integrate your art, writing, and imagination to build a world that’s all your own. This panel is for DMs, storytellers, and creators who want to merge their art and writing into more than the sum of its parts. Bring your drawings, your ideas, and your questions to an old-school worldbuilder with years of experience and a full portfolio to share.

occurrences.title: Tiktok Meet and Greet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by RebelDaFoxx_
Stop scrolling and start strolling over to our TikTok Meet & Greet to snap some paws-itively viral selfies with your favourite creators! It’s the purr-fect spot to show off your fur-sonality and collab on some tail-wagging new content.  Swing by and help us make some memories!

occurrences.title: Feral Meet-Up
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by FritzleFox_
We all know that the furry fandom revolves around anthropomorphic animals but have you ever considered the much rarer "feral side"? Come on by and show off your feral fursonas, just hang out or learn more about feral furries. Sticker and pin exchanging is welcome during the meet.

occurrences.title: Content Creators Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by RazzyWuff_
Are you a fellow Content Creator?? Tiktok! Twitter! Instagram! Twitch!! Or Any Social Media Platform! All Creators Welcome Big or Small this is for you! Come Meet Some Upcoming Content Creators Or Meet Some Ones You Already Know.

occurrences.title: Pet Play 101: There and Back Again
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Berith_
The road goes ever on and on - sometimes on all fours. In this panel, we’ll explore what pet play is, the ways it can be shared between partners, and the gear that can bring a scene to life. Along the way, we’ll touch on the importance of consent, communication, & community, ensuring that every adventure is safe and welcoming. Stay for the Q&A, where no question is too small or too curious. Whether you’re a first-time wanderer or returning traveler, join us for an evening of learning, laughter, and discovery.

occurrences.title: Fellowship of the Pets: Pet Play Meet-up and Mosh
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Berith_
Join us on a legendary adventure where tails wag, paws dance, and fellowship reigns supreme! Whether you’re a brave pup, a mischievous kitty, or a noble creature of any kind, come mingle, play, and celebrate the joy of pet play in a welcoming, spirited gathering of like-minded friends!

occurrences.title: Toastys Fursuit Dwarven Riches Scramble!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Winterpeg_
The dragon Smaug's treasury has been emptied. Come and scramble to get as many trinkets as you can. Full fursuits and partials welcome. Hand Paws, Claws, Hooves required. *No Human Hands allowed*

occurrences.title: Radio/Remote Controlled Hobbyists Meet (RC Cars, Planes, etc.)
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Absolarix_
RC cars, planes, helicopters, boats or other radio-controlled vehicles! Whether you're a long-time enthusiast, new to the hobby, or just think they're neat, swing by to hang out! If you have an RC car, truck, tank, or other GROUND-ONLY RC, you are allowed to run it in a sectioned off area during this meetup! No aerial vehicles can be operated in the con space.

occurrences.title: UNDER THE MOON WEREWOLVES & WOLVES UNITE!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Greyfang_
First ever Werewolves & Wolf Meetup. The 1st time for a werewolf & Wolf meetup. Come and meet other werewolves, show your suit, have a laugh or a snarl & meet your fellow werewolves. Be a part of a big pack. Don't have to be just a werewolf, can be a wolf too. Realistic or toony welcome. Little Werewolves welcome also.

occurrences.title: Pawsona Puppetry Presents: Behind and Under the Puppets
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Spacemom_
Come talk with Spacemom and crew over past shows, ask those burning questions you have had, play with puppets and more. Join us in this meet and greet. 18+

occurrences.title: Leather Furs Meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Elio Bones_
Come meet your fellow fellas in the leather scene! We're here to discuss, show off, and celebrate the venerable culture of the leathermen - though, these days, it'd be foolish to limit ourselves to just men. All are welcome! Whether you're a greymuzzle who's done time on fire island, a curious cat who's hot for chaps, or just want to know why Rob Halford is dressed like that, swing on by and say hi!

occurrences.title: Making Polymer Claws & Teeth
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Greyfang_
How to make Polymer Claws & Teeth. Broke a tooth and need one in a jiffy? Make your own to replace it. Broke a nail and need one so you can claw at your friends? Learn how to make one. Make different colours & shapes.

occurrences.title: Bingo
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by TheGooseberryFool_
Come play some good old-fashioned bingo with the opportunity to win some prizes!

occurrences.title: Come make a button!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Sarrow and Flora_
Come make your own 2.25-inch button. Pencils & markers provided to draw or bring a sticker.

occurrences.title: Frankenplush
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Bayou_
Want a new original fluffy friend? Come make one! With second-hand plushies and miscellaneous decorative bits and bobs supplied by the panelists, make your own frankenplush! If you happen to have your own hand-sewing supplies (needles, thread, glue gun, fabric scissors, thread cutter etc.), please bring them in to ensure that everyone can get what they need (some supplies will be provided at the event)

occurrences.title: Create a Sparklesona!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Razor_
Back and flashier than before! Come colour in custom-drawn sparkle dog, cat, dragon etc. colouring pages now with new lineart available! Colouring sheets may have limited stock, come swing by and bring your sparkly specimen to life! Crayons, markers, pencil crayons are provided, feel free to bring your own too!

occurrences.title: TransFemme 201 - AfterDark
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by EmKat_
Ever had some questions about transfemme sensuality? General tips and tricks for intimate clothing sizing? This and more as an 18+ continuation of TransFemme 101

occurrences.title: Vore Furs Meet and Eat
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Tiberius Thyben_
A get together to meet, chat, and hang out with other furries with an interest in vore!  Open to preds, prey, and anything in between who would like to connect with like-minded folk, or scope out their next meal.

occurrences.title: Do Your Dailies
occurrences.abstract: Just a quick meetup for anyone trying to keep their streak up in their favourite game or gamified app.

occurrences.title: Meet your VC!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hostied by Toasty_
You want to say hi to Toasty and introduce yourself, but he's always so busy helping run the con! During this time slot, feel free to talk to, meet, and have fun with your VC, TOASTY! Feel free to ask questions, tell jokes, and just have fun.

occurrences.title: So your kid is a furry, eh?
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Spacemom_
Are you a parent? Not sure about this furry stuff? Come talk to us about the furry, and what it means, ask questions and meet other furry parents.

occurrences.title: Retro Computer Meet, Greet, and Showcase!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Duga_
Have an interest in retro or unique computing? Come and talk with fellow furs and learn about old and unusual computer hardware!

occurrences.title: Prancing Pony Pub Quiz
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jaime Thundercat_
Gather your friends (or foes, I don't judge) for a friendly nerd-off on all things Middle Earth. The game is simple: write down the correctest or funniest answer to the Tolkien questions I ask. Only the correct answer will get points, but the laughs are just as important.

occurrences.title: Guest of Honour Dinner
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Come and join us for an amazing meal served up at the Delta Edmonton Centre, with speeches from our Guests of Honour, Ollie and Temperance.

Due to water damage at the Top of the Inn, this event has had to be moved. Transportation leaves from the Delta South at 4:15 PM, and leaves from the Delta Edmonton Centre at 6:30 PM. Please be on time as the coaches will depart promptly. The address for the updated venue is 10222 102 Street NW.

There is a form at https://forms.office.com/r/ZAzBZkPfuF that can be filled out regarding accessibility requirements and allergies. Please fill it out before July 13 if you have purchased tickets. Please contact general@fureh.ca with any concerns, particularly regarding accessibiity, so that we can make arrangements with the Delta.

occurrences.title: Cutthroat Artist
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Come, watch artists compete for the title of the most Cutthroat artist of Kibble-Earth. If you would like your character used as an audience member please bring a reference! And bring cash or plastic to make our artists live easier or harder as Chinona makes sure getting the title isn't straightforward or easy!
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Thall Eats and Toasty Drinks - Pub Edition
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Chinona_
Chinona has a mind full of new and creative torments for Thall and Toasty to suffer through in order to raise funds for G.E.A.R.S.  And of course, if you raise enough, you might even get Chinona to suffer!
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: One Wing to Rule Them All
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mousie_
A hot wing eating challenge with levels of spice that slowly get hotter! This will be a charity event where the participants pay $20 to enter. The audience can donate to the charity to give different surprise relief items to the participants to help with the heat. Not all of the relief items will be... tasty. The winner gets a prize!

Sauces by [Dark Bunny Sauces](https://darkbunny.ca/).
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Dance Competition
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kierenshep_
Back once more!  The Fur-Eh! Dance Competition promises an amazing display of talent, choreography, grace, and musicality.  Priority Seating for Sponsors and Accessibility in effect.
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Dance - Saturday
occurrences.abstract:
A fun way to end the night dancing until late with a variety of DJs and genres! 
10 - Adam Ott (House, Top 40, Dance)
11 - Fleabagz (Dubstep, Riddim Dubstep)
12 - DOGMATIK (Gabber, Hardcore, Hardstyle, Happy Hardcore, Uptempo)
1 - EiRR0R (Hard Dance, Techno, and a little DnB & Psytrance)
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Fursuit Maid Café
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Misaki and Flecko the Fennec_
Founded in 2017 in Vancouver, BC, [Mirai Wonder Café](https://linktr.ee/miraiwondercafe) is bringing together Fur-Eh!'s very first fursuit maid café! Join us for 1.5hrs of kawaii energy and entertainment, complete with yummy snacks and drinks.

occurrences.title: Ultimate Werewolf
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fyger_
Seems our panel has once again become home to some very hungry beasts.  Join us in this hidden role game sussing out fellow villagers from werewolves. (Open to players brand-new to seasoned)

occurrences.title: Twisted Tails Escape Room
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Twisted Tails Escape_
Can your team of rescue rangers save this group of animals from The Woes of Wyvern Woods? Tickets are $35 CAD per person with a maximum of 10 players per group. Players by themselves or in a small group will be paired up with other like-minded adventurers to a maximum of 10 players per game. For private bookings, a minimum of 5 tickets must be purchased. Also, a portion of every ticket will go to the convention's charity! Purchase tickets online at [TwistedTailsEscape.com]([url](https://www.twistedtailsescape.com/)) or at our table during the con. If you have any questions, please contact us directly at info@twistedtailsescape.com. See you soon!

occurrences.title: Artist Lounge
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Part Time Dragons (Spike)_
A cozy, social space designed for artists, creatives, and doodlers of all skill levels to relax, make art, and meet each other! Art Supplies are available to borrow and use in the Lounge. Come hang out, be creative and unwind from the con space!

occurrences.title: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Dukeskunk_
Some diabolical genius has locked one of you in a room with an explosive device and you need to disable it in order to survive. The Good News: your friends have the master bomb manual and can tell you what to do. The Bad News: they can't see the device and it is up to you to communicate what you are seeing.

occurrences.title: TTRPG DIY
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Bailey the Boar_
Are you interested in game design? Have you always wanted to make a TTRPG, but didn't know where to start? Come hang out with Bailey and chat about game design as a hobby while working on one of your very own! Dice, writing utensils, and templates for common indie TTRPG systems will be provided.

occurrences.title: The Furcon Cube (free Magic: the Gathering event)
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by squidpizza_
Play with a furry-themed Magic: the Gathering cube of premade jump-start packs! There will be blank tokens for players to customize, and you can put stickers on the cards. The event will be totally free, and it’s a great way to learn how to play! Event will be limited to the first 15 people to sign up at the event as it starts.

occurrences.title: Model train show and tell
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Charger_
Meeting of like-minded model train enthusiast to show projects and chat about model trains.

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Tabling
occurrences.abstract: _Presented by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: Brasil FurFest Portal
occurrences.abstract: Gaze into the Mirror of Pawladriel and see what's happening at one of the other conventions happening this weekend... [Brasil FurFest](https://brasilfurfest.com.br/?lang=en)!

occurrences.title: Fursuit Photo
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Time to show off all the amazing wearable art that the fandom has to offer. All fursuiters, both full and partials, are called to strike a pose for the group photo prior to the Fursuit Parade. Please note that during the setup for the photo, photos are *not* allowed in the Atrium.

occurrences.title: Fursuit Parade
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Weather permitting - ask your local wizard to ensure clear skies and reasonable temperatures!

Barring rain, one of Canada's only outdoor fursuit parades is set to make a reappearance! The parade will begin immediately after the Fursuit Photo has been taken.

occurrences.title: Dutch angel dragon meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Loosa_
One ring to rule them all? Nah how about a bunch of Dutchies to rule them all? Gather around for some silly Dutch angel dragon shenanigans.

occurrences.title: Poutine Social
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Boil them? Mash them? No! Slice 'em up, deep fry them until they are crispy and fluffy, then smother them in gravy curds and amazing toppings!

occurrences.title: Dealer's Den
occurrences.abstract: Friday only: Guests with Ranger or higher may enter starting at 9:45.

occurrences.title: Retro Saturday AM Cartoons
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Coffeespots_
Relive the excitement of waking up on Saturday morning and watching cartoons. We'll be sharing a selection of old cartoons and toy commercials disguised as cartoons in glorious standard definition.

occurrences.title: Fursona Lore and Storytelling: Year Two
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by The Lunar Crew_
After the grand slam success of last years how to on fursona lore I want to expand even further on more topics and bring more of my crew in to help explain the details. Prepare to learn everything that I can teach about lore writing, world building, and exploration.

occurrences.title: Paw Pains
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jaydar_
Do you suffer from pain in your wrists, elbows, shoulders, or neck? Do you need to use a wrist brace or compression gloves to get any work done? Jaydar is a muscle and joint specialist who is at the forefront of new and exciting research that is already affecting treatment techniques. Join us for a panel discussing muscle and joint issues, why they occur, and what you can do about it!

occurrences.title: The Church of Baja Blast
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Baja_
The Church of Baja Blast is an award-winning satirical panel that highlights my autism-driven love for the Mountain Dew drink Baja Blast. We discuss the commandments of thy Dew, play Baja Blast Jeopardy for prizes, confess your Baja sins to Priest Baja Werewolf, and a lot more! Join the fun and bond over our love of Baja Blast and Taco Bell. May Baja be thy Blast.

occurrences.title: Kink Curiosity
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jaydar_
Ever wondered if different species of furries are into different kinks? Turns out, they are! Join Jaydar as we delve into the data - what it can tell us, what patterns emerge, and find out which proclivities are most common for different species!

occurrences.title: 18+ Jackbox
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by SydneyRoo_
**18+** You don't know Jackbox? This isn't your granny's gameshow. Bring your phone and give us your worst Quiplash! Don't be late!

occurrences.title: TransFemme 301
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by EmKat_
Have questions about pulling it all together? Passing in public? Strategies for gender dysphoria while still being functional?  
Come join this safe-space to discuss best strategies in this seminar style panel.

occurrences.title: Return of the Handler or All We Have to Decide is What to do With the Leash That is Given to Us
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Berith_
One does not simply walk into handling. This panel dives into the role of the handler in pet play—exploring consent, communication, training, and the unseen labor of care. Not all who walk beside a pet seek the throne. Some carry the leash, the treats, and the responsibility. Join us for a handler-focused journey into pet play—where consent is sacred, care is power, and leadership is earned, not claimed. A panel for those who guide, protect, and occasionally say, “That way lies mischief.”

occurrences.title: PokémonFKR: The Game
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mana_
Would you consider yourself a first-class Pokémon pervert? Well if so, come take part in a panel where we will be enjoying some good ol’ fashion Pokémon pornography, while also playing a game I like to call ‘which Pokémon does THAT belong to?’. Because if you really are a hardcore Pokémon pervert, shouldn’t you be able to figure out which Pokémon it is by their bits and bobs alone? So come on down and test your weird knowledge of pokemon perversion, you coward. Please bring your phone too! You’ll need it to play.

occurrences.title: Neopets Fan Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by StarBiology_
Are you a Neopian? Do want to be?  We'll be discussing the past lore of Neopia, recent developments of the current plot (Yes! Neopets is still running!), and partake in trading stickers, colouring, showing off your merch, and learn the new Battledome TCG, all while meeting other fans of the site. Fans and Newcomers of all ages are welcome!

occurrences.title: Enamel Pin Trading
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Shiloh, Ketchi, and Fabl_
Come join Ketchi, Fabl and Shiloh for Enamel Pin Trading! Whether you're new to trading pins or a seasoned collector of them, all are welcome! (Please note, any pins made by using AI-generated images are NOT allowed to be traded here)

occurrences.title: Making a collaborative art piece
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ollie Canal, Temperance_
Join the Guests of Honour Ollie and Temperance discussing how they collaborated to make a con themed art piece. They will share insights into their individual drawing styles and techniques on how an image comes together, and how a collaborative piece can highlight the special skills of both artists.

occurrences.title: Mechanical Puzzles!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Remy_
Are you a fan of all mechanical puzzles? Want to learn? Well if so, come visit! We will have a brief presentation on the different types of puzzles and plenty free ones for you to try! Feel free to bring your own puzzles as well!

occurrences.title: Hybrid Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kiesh_
We all know that there is always a wide variety of meetups; Canine meetup, Dutchie meetup, Feline meetup, but there never seems to be a hybrid meetup... Until now!! Come hang with us and see some hybrids you never knew existed!! ALL species welcome, INCLUDING NON-hybrids!!

occurrences.title: Bunny Bunch Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Bunsai (Toasty)_
Are you a bunny, or bunny adjacent??? Come hang out with other long-eared, wiggly-nosed cuties. Group photo at the end. Please bring your own carrots!

occurrences.title: Open-Level Wh/aacking with Fusil!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fusil_
Wh/aacking is a club-style dance born out of the disco era of the 70s, characterized by rapid arm twirls and strong expression of self. Come down and learn the history, foundations, and technique that make this dance as fabulous as it is! Bring a friend, bring water, and be ready to sweat!

occurrences.title: Inflatable Suit Tryouts
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by IndieTimber_
Do you want to be big and round, or a living pooltoy? Come on over, and you can try out the inflatable ball suit or a squeaky animal. Feel free to bring your own.

occurrences.title: Feline Furmeet and Prop Playtime!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Vitawny_
Calling all felines! Join us for a fun meetup and play with giant fursuit-sized props! Non-felines are also welcome! (You can be an honorary cat!) Group photo will be taken at the end of the panel!

occurrences.title: Alberta Hypno-Furs Meet-up!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cooozy_
Hypnosis is quickly becoming a commonplace interest in the furry community, and yet it can feel tricky to get involved with. Whether you're just curious or long-time experienced, join a room full of like-minded furs to chat, learn and mingle.

occurrences.title: Babyfur Meet and Greet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Blake_
A meetup for all those who are small at heart or are curious about what being a little and age play is about! There will be a Q&A, stuffies, colouring, games with prizes, and more!

occurrences.title: Space out together!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fen and Flora_
Do you star gaze or love space? Let's talk about constellations, the moon or random fascinating facts about space!

occurrences.title: Lord of the Wings Photo Shoot
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cielle_
Don your best adventuring gear and strike your best pose in front of a stylized backdrop. You can bring your own prop or pick from a small selection of available items. Whether you offer your bow, your axe, or take the heaviest burden, show that you're ready to go on an adventure!

occurrences.title: Pagan Witchy Spiritual Meet 'n' Greet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kin_
A place for community! Are you pagan? Witchy? Spiritual? Some flavour in between? Still figuring it out or just curious? Well then come on down and meet with other like-minded individuals for an hour of fellowship and community! This is a meet n greet not an educational panel

occurrences.title: Pokésona Meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by BlopKitsune_
Back again for more fun! Come hang out and chat about all things Pokémon and discuss your pokésonas if you've got 'em!

occurrences.title: VRChat Meet and Greet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by RebelDaFoxx_
Don't let your frame rate drop, it’s time to teleport over to our VRChat Meet & Greet! Whether you’re showing off a custom fur-sona or just vibing in a new world, come hang out and make some virt-wool memories with the pack. No need to paws for loading; just hop in and show us your best fur-tual reality moves!

occurrences.title: Metal meetup with sword guy vol. 3
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Xeno_
The beacons have been lit and the metalheads answer the call. We once again gather to talk things metal and meet other metal furs in the scene. This year we’ll go over Tolkien and fantasy elements in the genre.

occurrences.title: 18+ Creator Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Zircon Wolfdog_
Are you a spicy creator? Do you create art of the more cultured variety? Are your paws PPV? This is a meetup for creators of NSFW content to mingle and make connections!

occurrences.title: Rubber Furs Photoshoot and Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by IndieTimber_
Come on over to the panel and show off your rubber suit with a striking pose. You can interact and make friends with some rubber furs. Anyone who's curious can join.

occurrences.title: Puppet Building workshop
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Temperance_
Yay!  Build a puppet friend you can take home with you.  You will get to sew, customize and accessorize your very own puppet. Materials to be provided, space may be limited so please arrive early to ensure you secure a spot.

occurrences.title: Furry Swap Meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Mellybean_
The furry swap meet returns for the third year! Are you looking to rehome something furry or nerdy but don't know the right person to give it to? Bring it to the furry swap meet and leave it for someone else to take home while you find something for yourself. Bring up to a max of three G-rated items and leave with up to three in return. First hour will be item drop off, with the second hour being for claiming.

occurrences.title: Divination 101
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kin_
Come learn some basics about Divination such as Tarot, Oracle Cards, Runes, and more!

occurrences.title: Traditional Art in Coloured Pencil
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ollie Canal_
Learn the ancient art of coloured pencils, and how to shade and blend colours to create smooth gradients, vivid details, and even ultraviolet secrets.  I'll teach you the materials, the medium, and the methods to make your art truly one of a kind, and beyond the reach of AI. Bring your sketchbook and I'll supply everything else you need.

occurrences.title: Vore 102 : Electric Boogaloo
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ant_
Do you want to hear an info dump on the ins and outs of vorophilia? Do you like maws? I have been inside vore longer than some furs have been alive. Come learn some weird new things. Also size queens rejoice I asked for a bigger room this time.

occurrences.title: Fatfur Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Peryton_
Fur-Eh!'s largest meetup! Expect a brief icebreaker followed by freeform social time. All bodies welcome, just bring a big heart.

occurrences.title: Do Your Dailies
occurrences.abstract: Just a quick meetup for anyone trying to keep their streak up in their favourite game or gamified app.

occurrences.title: Trading Cards and Trinkets
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Moon_
After the showstopper success of year one, we’re back for more with more potential trades. Come on by to trade everything from Pokemon to Magic the Gathering to Dice and everything in between.

occurrences.title: Therians & Otherkin Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Kurt_
Therians and otherkin make up a small but significant fraction of the furry fandom. Have you ever wanted to connect with others who feel the same as you? Therians, otherkin, and their allies are welcome to join for this casual meet-up. Feel free to bring your own small-group games to play, or just enjoy the conversation!

occurrences.title: Brony Meet
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Raf_
For all My Little Pony fans! Bringing merch and plushies is encouraged! Talk, trade, watch the show in the background, and most importantly: make friends, everypony!

occurrences.title: Motorama, presented by Fenix
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fenix_
Come join us at the Delta Parkade to experience the furry side of the car community! See artistic expression on display on 4 wheels, whether you're an enthusiast or not, this event is approachable to everyone! Not only is this a car show this is a congregation space for everything on wheels, including entertainment, games, and will be ending it off with a best-in-show award chosen by you!

occurrences.title: Charity Auction
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
Come and bid on amazing themed art, banners and donated items. All proceeds go towards G.E.A.R.S. New item this year that you won't want to miss: the Toasty Bath Handler – come bid for the right to toss a bucket of soapy water over Toasty!
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Closing Ceremonies
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
We come now to the end of these golden days.  Join us before we sail off to the grey shores and leave this theme so that the next may have its time. Priority Seating will be given to Rangers, Guardians, and Ringbearers. No badge required.
Watch the live stream on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/furehconvention) or [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@furehconvention).

occurrences.title: Vagabonds Court (Beginner Friendly Dance Comp/Floor Wars)
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jenju_
Didn't make the cut for your favourite dance event? Fret not, traveller! Vagabonds Court provides a space for up-and-coming dancers to display their skills in a dance competition and battle format. Sign-ups can be done at the con or through [Google Forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScwnr83Y6OheygRsRypeXjPQpVf9KbH0DwwjnP4sqXK9Md1Fw/viewform?usp=header ).

occurrences.title: BONE DUCK Live!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by oly_
BONE DUCK is the music of melburn mcduck, AKA oly. Guitar-driven, synthesizer supported, these are songs of joy and despair, triumph and defeat, and being a small woodland creature who just wants your bones!

occurrences.title: Sunday Night After Party
occurrences.abstract:
We go now into the West beyond the closing ceremony to frolic and be merry one last time this year.
7 - TekTonic (Funky House)
8 - rave cat (Electro-Swing)
9 - LoneWo1fy (Electronic, EuroDance, Happy-hardcore, Bootleg, Bounce)
10 - XaiuFox (Bass House, ElectroBreaks)
11 - DJ GiR (Happy Hardcore)

occurrences.title: Twisted Tails Escape Room
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Twisted Tails Escape_
Can your team of rescue rangers save this group of animals from The Woes of Wyvern Woods? Tickets are $35 CAD per person with a maximum of 10 players per group. Players by themselves or in a small group will be paired up with other like-minded adventurers to a maximum of 10 players per game. For private bookings, a minimum of 5 tickets must be purchased. Also, a portion of every ticket will go to the convention's charity! Purchase tickets online at [TwistedTailsEscape.com]([url](https://www.twistedtailsescape.com/)) or at our table during the con. If you have any questions, please contact us directly at info@twistedtailsescape.com. See you soon!

occurrences.title: Artist Lounge
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Part Time Dragons (Spike)_
A cozy, social space designed for artists, creatives, and doodlers of all skill levels to relax, make art, and meet each other! Art Supplies are available to borrow and use in the Lounge. Come hang out, be creative and unwind from the con space!

occurrences.title: Telestrations
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Jia_
AKA GarticPhone: a combination of Telephone and Pictionary.  Draw the prompt you are given, then summarise the picture you are shown, continue and then when you are done review the hilarity. Can’t draw? No time to worry about that, besides the focus is on the fun, not the art.

occurrences.title: Jackbox Games
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Dukeskunk_
Drawful, Quiplash, Trivia Murder Party, maybe Tee KO. Interactive group hilarity. Please make sure your smart phone or tablet is fully charged as it is your control device. We will try to make sure everyone gets a turn.

occurrences.title: Staff/Volunteer Meal
occurrences.abstract: All staff and volunteers are welcome to join us for this thank you dinner.

occurrences.title: HIV Edmonton Tabling
occurrences.abstract: _Presented by HIV Edmonton_

occurrences.title: Brasil FurFest Portal
occurrences.abstract: Gaze into the Mirror of Pawladriel and see what's happening at one of the other conventions happening this weekend... [Brasil FurFest](https://brasilfurfest.com.br/?lang=en)!

occurrences.title: Dog's Second Breakfast
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fur-Eh! Staff_
You've had one breakfast at the Wyndham for sure, but what about Second Breakfast? This is your chance to have just that. Dogs rejoice everywhere at Second Breakfast.

occurrences.title: Nintendo 3DS Streetpass Meetup
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Cantaloupe_
Come meet up with fellow 3DS enthusiasts, receive Streetpasses, and complete your puzzles or other games!

occurrences.title: Dealer's Den
occurrences.abstract: Friday only: Guests with Ranger or higher may enter starting at 9:45.

occurrences.title: Cryptozoology 101: From Buyips to Wampus Cats
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Viz the Bogeyman_
A crash course on cryptids, fearsome critters, lake monsters, and folkloric beasts. Whether you're looking for inspiration for some strange creatures for your next story, worldbuilding project, art, or original character, or if you want to meet up with some fellow cryptid and urban legend aficionados, this panel is for you!

occurrences.title: Rise of Furry Music
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ember_
Learn about the history and current moment of music in the furry community. Ember will also cover how to best support your fellow furry musicians in current day!

occurrences.title: Foxy Tails with Flecko the Fennec
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Flecko the Fennec_
Travel down the path of lore as Flecko the Fennec takes you on a journey through stories of animal transformations and mischievous foxes from historical mythology and folklore.

occurrences.title: Feral Crafting with Flecko the Fennec
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Flecko the Fennec_
Stop in on your way to Mordor to learn the feral arts. Learn how to tan animal hides into leather and fur, clean skulls, carve bone and work with feathers.

occurrences.title: The Furry Fandom: ANTHROpology and Furry Folklore
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ilinx Fær_
Do you want to learn about current academic research on furries by furries, but seeing statistics makes you break out in hives? Do you like esoteric queer theory? If you said yes to either, you're in luck! In this panel, join Elías (a linguistic anthropology PhD student) and Ilinx (an amateur furry folklorist) from the University of Alberta who will regale you with the latest in their research on the furry fandom! Come and see the kind of cutting-edge research your taxes are paying for!

occurrences.title: LethFURidge Relaxy Time
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Vitawny_
Come relax and re-energize at our cozy, low-energy socializing hour. Bringing plushies, blankets and comfort items are encouraged! We'll also be giving a short informative talk about Southern Alberta's furry club, LethFURidge and our yearly Mini-Con.

occurrences.title: Are you lichen Fur-Eh!?
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Sour_
An introduction to the world of lichens! Learn about the different varieties of lichen we have in the Edmonton region and maybe try identifying some of your own!

occurrences.title: Fly, You Fools! An Exploration of Insect Wings
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Berith_
A lighthearted deep dive into the many forms and functions of insect wings. Discover how wings evolved, hidden, lost, and used for flight, defense, and display—because in the insect world, not all who wander fly the same.

occurrences.title: STICKER SWAP MEET
occurrences.abstract:
_Hostied by Toasty_
Everyone loves stickers, but it is so hard to track down that one suiter you want a sticker from. Now's your chance to get that sticker!!!

occurrences.title: Basics to Ukrainian Dance
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Ickpa_
Have you ever wanted to learn what Ukrainian dancers do? Ickpa will be hosting an intro class of what a Ukrainian dancer does. He will show basic steps in the different styles and will teach a simple choreo.

occurrences.title: Fursona Lore Dump
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by TheGooseberryFool_
Does your Fursona or OC have LORE? Do you want to tell someone all about it? Join this meetup to get the chance to share your character's/fursona's story!

occurrences.title: Besties wear blue 💙
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by BlopKitsune_
Let's call this what it really is - an excuse to meet up with a bunch of blue fursuiters! Here's hoping this triggers a rainbow of other furry meetups in coming years!

occurrences.title: Crow Meet: Smol & Shiny Swap!
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Fidget Nutmouse_
We've all seen them; those wonderful little smol plastic creatures taking up roost in every nook and cranny in the convention space. You've found the bunnies and the triceratops, but somehow you missed the axolotls and the ferrets! – but fear not!  Now you can TRADE! Bring your duplicates, your shiniest shinies and beads, and your general smol weirdness to swap and trade with other like-minded crow-folk! [This is an All-Ages event, so all trade items must be PG.]

occurrences.title: Rocks and Minerals: Interactive Identification
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Clyde_
We will do a short presentation on how to identify rocks and minerals before being given the opportunity to try and identify some samples of mine! There will be a sheet of information from the slides so you don't have to have perfect memory to try.

occurrences.title: Do Your Dailies
occurrences.abstract: Just a quick meetup for anyone trying to keep their streak up in their favourite game or gamified app.

occurrences.title: Furry Fibre Artists meet up
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Socket_
A meet up for all the furry fibre artists who want to take a little time to chill and create at the con! Bring a fibre art project or even just come hang out!

occurrences.title: Bird Panel
occurrences.abstract:
_Hosted by Half Pint_
Hello, are you a bird, bird food, or curious folksona? Come check out my bird panel.
